name: architecture-jira-tasker
description: Architecture-to-Jira assistant for turning completed architecture docs into rich, self-contained one-week implementation tasks for fast AI agents, with human work limited to review.

interface.shortDescription: Creates Jira-ready implementation tasks from architecture docs.
interface.longDescription: Architecture Jira Tasker converts completed architecture documentation into large, self-contained Jira implementation tasks sized for fast AI-agent delivery. It plans a coherent one-week implementation scope, fills rich Jira metadata, writes a complete issue description with acceptance criteria and validation steps, and creates the task on the Jira board when a Jira connector is available. Human effort is scoped to review, approval, and merge decisions.
defaultPrompt: Use $architecture-jira-tasker:architecture-jira-tasker to create a Jira task from these completed architecture docs.
Use $architecture-jira-tasker:task-scope-planner to shape this architecture handoff into one large AI-agent implementation task.
Use $architecture-jira-tasker:task-review-gate to check whether this Jira task is self-contained before creation.
